task_objective: Sanitize missingness heatmap for non-finite values
design_decisions: Updated `MissingEngine.compute` to use `math.isfinite` for validating nullity correlation values.
Modified the return structure of `MissingEngine.compute` to include an `alerts` (warnings) list.
Updated `Profiler._run_final_pass` to extract and report warnings from `MissingEngine`.
Defaulted non-finite correlation values to 0.0 in the heatmap matrix.
results: Missingness heatmap is now sanitized for NaN/Inf values. Verified with new unit tests ensuring 0% and 100% missing columns are handled gracefully with warnings. Full suite passes.
